summary: Verified Backup History with Auto-Backup and Extended Audit Trail features. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verification successful: Activity Log page (/registro-attivita) shows stats, filters, table with audit entries. Settings page Backup tab shows auto-backup section with daily backup info (keeps last 7). Settings page Notifiche tab has all notification preference controls.

backup_history_endpoint.description: GET /api/admin/backup/history returns history array with 'auto' boolean flag for each entry

backup_last_endpoint.description: GET /api/admin/backup/last returns last_backup object with date, filename, total_records, size_bytes, stats

backup_stats_endpoint.description: GET /api/admin/backup/stats returns per-collection stats dict and total count

stats_action_labels.description: action_labels includes Italian translations: Creazione, Modifica, Eliminazione

elements_verified: Stats cards: Oggi (4), Ultima settimana (4), Totale registri (4), Utenti attivi (1)
Filters: search, Tipo entita dropdown, Azione dropdown, date pickers
Table with entries showing Eliminazione/Creazione badges for Preventivo and Cliente
All data-testids present: activity-log-title, activity-stats, activity-filters, activity-table-container
Esporta Backup section with Esegui Backup Ora green button
Ripristina da Backup section with file selector
Backup Automatico section showing: Il sistema esegue un backup automatico giornaliero. Vengono conservati gli ultimi 7 backup automatici.
Shows Nessun backup nello storico for new users

minor.issue: Console warning: value prop on input should not be null - minor React warning, no functional impact

seed_data_creation: Created test user with admin role and session for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup History with Auto-Backup and Extended Audit Trail features verified. Backup tab at /settings shows auto-backup section with daily backup info (keeps last 7 backups). GET /api/admin/backup/history returns entries with 'auto' boolean flag. Activity log now supports rilievo and perizia entity types. Notification preferences fully working with preavviso_giorni persistence.
